idea-plugin.name: Terminal AI Watcher
idea-plugin.description: Monitors Android Studio's built-in terminal for AI CLI tool events (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) and sends IDE notifications with system sounds.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0

  • New: Granular notification controls — independently toggle Dock badge, system notification, IDE balloon, and sound
  • New: Customizable alert sound — choose from 11 system sounds or browse for your own audio file
  • New: Sound preview — hear the sound immediately when selecting
  • Fix: Badge count now auto-clears when IDE already has focus
  • Fix: Codex notifications no longer appear in all open IDE windows
  • Fix: Settings preserved when upgrading from v1.0.x

1.0.2

  • New: macOS native notifications via SystemNotifications API — IDE icon displayed, click activates IDE
  • New: IDE-only notifications — external terminals ignored (JetBrains-JediTerm filter)
  • New: PPID chain routing — notifications go only to the originating IDE instance
  • New: IntelliJ IDEA compatibility (build 261+) — works alongside Android Studio
  • New: Dynamic port allocation — multiple IDEs run simultaneously without conflicts
  • New: Codex tui.notifications for approval-requested alerts (terminal bell)
  • Fix: Stale port file cleanup on startup (handles crash/force quit)
  • Fix: Race condition resolved — server fully ready before hook registration
  • Fix: Filtered out idle_prompt / auth_success noise notifications
  • Improve: Dock badge counter auto-resets when IDE gains focus
  • Improve: Migrated to SimplePersistentStateComponent (future-proof settings)
  • Improve: Removed all reflection — uses official ContentManager API only
  • Improve: Removed osascript dependency — all notifications via IDE internal APIs

1.0.0

  • AI CLI Hook-based event detection (zero false positives)
  • Claude Code: Notification + Stop hooks for permission prompts and task completion
  • Codex: notify hook for task completion (agent-turn-complete)
  • Gemini CLI: Notification + AfterAgent hooks for permission prompts and task completion
  • Built-in HTTP server (localhost:19876) receives hook events
  • Auto-configures hook settings for each CLI tool on first run
  • IntelliJ balloon notifications with sound alerts (afplay)
  • Per-tool enable/disable in Settings > Tools > Terminal AI Watcher
